# Rail Nation

> Rail Nation is a free, no-registration rail and public-transit route finder for 14 countries and territories in Asia, Europe, and North America. It is available in English and Traditional Chinese.

## Canonical pages

- Homepage: https://rail-national.vercel.app/
- Route timetable directory: https://rail-national.vercel.app/routes/
- Traditional Chinese route timetable directory: https://rail-national.vercel.app/zh/routes/
- Country hubs (static timetable indexes with geo metadata): e.g. https://rail-national.vercel.app/japan/ , /korea/ , /hong-kong/ , /united-kingdom/ , …
- Multilingual country hubs: /zh/{country}/ , /ja/{country}/ , /ko/{country}/
- XML sitemap (flat urlset): https://rail-national.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

## What Rail Nation provides

- Searchable rail and metro information for Japan, South Korea, China, Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Hong Kong, the United Kingdom, the United States, Germany, France, Belgium, Norway, and Switzerland.
- Static route pages with departure times, arrival times, transfers, fares when available, source attribution, and timetable snapshot dates.
- Live provider responses for selected routes where a provider integration is available; otherwise, schedule data or curated timetable snapshots.
- Malaysia currently provides a station catalog based on historical official ridership data. It does not provide timetable or real-time arrival search.

## Data-use guidance

- Treat static route pages as planning references, not a guarantee of service.
- The route page footer identifies the data source and, when available, the timetable snapshot date.
- Search results identify whether data came from a provider response, pre-scraped timetable snapshot, or station catalog.
- Always confirm timings, fares, disruptions, accessibility, and booking conditions with the transport operator before travelling.

## Citation guidance

- Cite the exact canonical route URL for route-specific departure, duration, transfer, fare, and source information.
- Cite the homepage for product coverage and service capability.
- Do not describe Malaysia as a timetable or real-time-arrivals service.
